medium_zh: [V] 位于画面中央，以正面姿态出现，背景为模糊的树木，被自然光均匀照亮
medium_en: [V] is centered in the frame, presented in a frontal pose, with a blurred tree background, evenly lit by natural light
detailed_zh: [V] 位于画面中央，以正面姿态出现，头部略微上扬，背景为模糊的树木，被自然光均匀照亮，构图采用特写镜头，景深较浅，整体氛围清新自然
detailed_en: [V] is centered in the frame, presented in a frontal pose with the head slightly raised, against a blurred tree background, evenly lit by natural light, shot with a close-up composition and shallow depth of field, creating a fresh and natural atmosphere
user_prompt_zh: 请帮我生成一张 [V] 在户外场景中的特写照片，主体位于画面中央，正面朝向镜头，背景为模糊的树木，光线自然柔和
user_prompt_en: Please generate a close-up photo of [V] in an outdoor scene, centered in the frame, facing the camera frontally, with a blurred tree background and natural soft lighting

medium_zh: [V] 坐在灰色石质边缘上，背景是盛开的粉色花树，镜头从低角度仰拍，主体位于画面中央，被明亮的自然光照亮
medium_en: [V] sitting on a gray stone ledge, with blooming pink trees in the background, shot from a low angle looking up, [V] centered in the frame, illuminated by bright natural light
detailed_zh: [V] 以坐姿出现在画面中，位于前景的灰色石质边缘上，背景是虚化的粉色花枝与浅蓝色天空，镜头采用低角度仰拍，构图居中，景深较浅，主体被柔和的自然光均匀照亮，整体氛围清新明亮
detailed_en: [V] appears in a seated pose in the foreground on a gray stone ledge, with blurred pink blossoms and a pale blue sky in the background, shot from a low angle looking up, centered composition, shallow depth of field, evenly lit by soft natural light, creating a fresh and bright atmosphere
user_prompt_zh: 请帮我生成一张 [V] 坐在户外石台上的照片，背景是盛开的花树，采用低角度仰拍，光线明亮自然
user_prompt_en: Please generate a photo of [V] sitting on an outdoor stone ledge with blooming trees in the background, shot from a low angle with bright natural lighting

medium_zh: [V] 坐在前景的浅色台面上，背景是橙红色墙面和模糊的粉色花枝，镜头采用中景构图，主体被自然光照亮
medium_en: [V] sitting on a light-colored foreground ledge, with an orange-red wall and blurred pink blossoms in the background; medium shot composition, naturally lit
detailed_zh: [V] 以坐姿出现在画面中，位于前景浅色台面之上，背景为暖色调的橙红色墙面，上方有虚化的粉色花枝点缀，镜头采用中景构图，主体被柔和的自然光均匀照亮，整体画面氛围温暖宁静，景深较浅，背景虚化突出主体
detailed_en: [V] appears in a seated pose on a light-colored foreground ledge, against a warm-toned orange-red wall with blurred pink blossoms above; medium shot composition, softly lit by natural light, creating a warm and tranquil atmosphere with shallow depth of field emphasizing the subject
user_prompt_zh: 请帮我生成一张 [V] 坐在户外台面上的照片，背景是橙红色墙面和粉色花枝，采用中景构图，自然光照亮主体，氛围温暖宁静
user_prompt_en: Please generate a photo of [V] sitting on an outdoor ledge, with an orange-red wall and pink blossoms in the background, using a medium shot composition, natural lighting, and a warm, tranquil atmosphere

medium_zh: [V] 以侧面姿态坐在白色台面上，背景是橙色墙面和模糊的粉色花枝，镜头采用中景构图
medium_en: [V] sits in profile on a white ledge, with an orange wall and blurred pink blossoms in the background, shot in medium framing
detailed_zh: [V] 以侧面姿态静坐于白色台面上，身体朝向画面右侧，背景为暖橙色墙面，上方有虚化的粉色花枝，光线柔和，画面采用中景构图，景深较浅，整体氛围宁静温馨
detailed_en: [V] sits in profile on a white ledge, facing right, against a warm orange wall with blurred pink blossoms above; soft lighting, medium shot with shallow depth of field, creating a calm and cozy atmosphere
user_prompt_zh: 请帮我生成一张 [V] 静坐于白色台面、背景为橙色墙面与粉色花枝的图片
user_prompt_en: Please generate an image of [V] sitting calmly on a white ledge, with an orange wall and pink blossoms in the background
